measures.jurisdiction: Rosalia Park and Recreation District No. 5
measures.title: Two Year Maintenance and Operations Levy for the Rosalia Pool
measures.what_it_does: Authorizes regular property tax levies in 2027 and 2028 to fund operating, maintaining, and improving the Rosalia Pool. Requires a 60% supermajority.
measures.cost_line: $85,000 per year, approximately $0.39 (maximum $0.60) per $1,000 of assessed value.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax, levy, bond, or annexation measure for the listed public service.

measures.jurisdiction: Whitman County Fire Protection District No. 1
measures.title: Annexation of the City of Tekoa
measures.what_it_does: Asks fire district voters whether the City of Tekoa should be annexed into Fire Protection District No. 1.
measures.cost_line: Annexed property becomes subject to the district's regular fire levies.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax, levy, bond, or annexation measure for the listed public service.

measures.title: Annexation into Fire Protection District No. 1
measures.what_it_does: Asks Tekoa voters whether the city should be annexed into Whitman County Fire Protection District No. 1.
measures.cost_line: City property becomes subject to the district's regular fire levies.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax, levy, bond, or annexation measure for the listed public service.

measures.title: Excess Levy
measures.what_it_does: Authorizes a one-year excess property tax levy for town operations.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax, levy, bond, or annexation measure for the listed public service.

measures.jurisdiction: Whitman County Fire Protection District No. 5
measures.title: Maintenance and Operations Levy
measures.what_it_does: Authorizes maintenance and operations levies collected 2027 through 2030.
measures.cost_line: $10,000 per year, approximately $0.21 per $1,000 of assessed value.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax, levy, bond, or annexation measure for the listed public service.
